name: lint_files
short_description: Run the Tcl linter on specified files.
full_help:
lint_files

Description: 
Run the Tcl linter on specified files.

Syntax: 
lint_files  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<files>...]

Returns: 
nothing.

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<files>]   List of Tcl files to lint

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
